title: SEC.co CVE enrichment output (Haiku 4.5 structured output)
description: AI-generated EXPLANATION layer only. Factual fields (CVSS, KEV, affected products, references, patch versions) are provided as ground truth and MUST NOT be invented. Validated live against claude-haiku-4-5 with output_config.format.

plain_english_summary.description: Non-expert-readable overview of what the vuln is and why it matters.

technical_summary.description: Mechanism/root cause for a technical reader. No exploit code.

affected_systems_summary.description: Narrative over the source-provided affected products; must not add products not in source.

exploitability_summary.description: Attack conditions in prose; no weaponized steps.

patch_guidance.description: Patch/mitigation guidance. Version numbers must trace to a source reference or be flagged 'verify vs vendor advisory'.

detection_guidance.description: How to detect exposure/exploitation (SCA, logs, IOCs) without exploit tooling.

prioritization_reason.description: Why to prioritize; may cite KEV/CVSS which are supplied as ground truth.

risk_score_explanation.description: Plain explanation of the supplied CVSS/EPSS — must not invent scores.

seo_title.description: ≤ ~60 chars incl. CVE ID + product + risk.
